title: UB2 4NA, Pilgrim’s Food Masters UK Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3139AM/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Pilgrim’s Food Masters UK Limited Installation name: Southall Ready Meals Factory Permit number: EPR/AP3139AM/V003  "
